case_title: ALIDA MARLENY FUENTES GODINEZ VS. CLEO GOMIDES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GODINEZ, ALIDA MARLENY FUENTES AS TO DEFENDANT GOMIDES, CLEO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
